title: Fortis Healthcare Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Fortis Healthcare Global Group is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Consultant Physician to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Fortis Healthcare Global Group:
Fortis Healthcare Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fortis Healthcare Global Group!
